Bash(python -c "
import sqlite3
import sys
import io
if sys.platform == 'win32':
    sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)

conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/demo.db'\)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
cursor = conn.cursor\(\)
cursor.execute\('SELECT * FROM articles WHERE id = 1'\)
article = cursor.fetchone\(\)

print\('=' * 70\)
print\(f'文章详情 [ID: {article[\\"id\\"]}]'\)
print\('=' * 70\)
print\(f'\\n标题: {article[\\"title\\"]}'\)
print\(f'公众号: {article[\\"account_name\\"]}'\)
print\(f'发布时间: {article[\\"publish_time\\"]}'\)
print\(f'\\n内容预览:'\)
print\(article['content'][:300]\)
print\('...'\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from collector.wechat_collector_v2 import WeChatCollectorV2
import sys
import io
if sys.platform == 'win32':
    sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)

collector = WeChatCollectorV2\(\)
print\('测试搜索功能...'\)
articles = collector.search_articles_sogou\('AI日报', max_results=3\)

if articles:
    print\(f'\\n搜索到 {len\(articles\)} 篇文章:'\)
    for i, a in enumerate\(articles, 1\):
        print\(f'\\n{i}. {a[\\"title\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'   URL: {a[\\"url\\"][:80]}...'\)
        print\(f'   公众号: {a[\\"account_name\\"]}'\)
else:
    print\('\\n未搜索到文章或遇到验证码'\)
")
